items.label: Site description
items.value: Cascade retrofit of the lighting-layout office-open-plan example. 80 m² open-plan office (10×8 m); 20 × LED_PANEL_600 panels at 4500 lm each on a 4×5 grid; lumen-method achieved 603 lux ≥ 500 target. Photometric-analysis verifies per-point illuminance + U₀ + UGR for full_drawing sign-off via lighting-layout INV-11.

value._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, 4500lm, 4000K, opal diffuser. Distribution: Lambertian cos(theta) per CIBSE LG7 §6.2 typical opal panel. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py. Engineer must substitute project IES.
